hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' /dev/stdin); case "$file" in *.py) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; dir=$(dirname "$file"); while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/pyproject.toml" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; cd "$dir" && uv run ruff check --fix "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; if ! out=$(uv run ruff check "$file" 2>&1); then { echo "Ruff lint issues in $file — fix in place; do NOT run ruff format or collapse multi-line statements:"; echo "$out"; } >&2; exit 2; fi
